betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Vacuum Refinery§f performs specialized petroleum processing under §blow-pressure conditions§f for products unavailable from standard refineries.

§eKey Products:§f
• §bReformate Gas§f - essential for High-Performance Solvent
• Specialty chemicals for advanced recipes

§eOperation:§f
• Works at reduced pressure for unique reactions
• Part of the advanced petrochemical chain
• Feeds into chemical synthesis pathways

§eUse Case:§f
Required for §bHigh-Performance Solvent§f production (Reformate Gas + Chlorine), which unlocks the best bedrock ore yields including §bBismuth§f and §bTechnetium-99§f.
